message.content: Read the file C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST02_LH_SAB\Module1.vb and find the Load_BASIC_Data() function. List ALL column names that are read from Table_BASIC (look for rs_MDB("column_name") or Rs.Fields("column_name") patterns). Also check if CheckAndAddTextColumn and CheckAndAddFlagColumn functions exist. Return the complete Load_BASIC_Data() function code.

   308→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   309→
   310→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   311→
   312→        hexv = ""
   313→        Do While DecNum > 0
   314→
   315→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   316→
   317→            Select Case na
   318→                Case 10
   319→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   320→                Case 11
   321→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   322→                Case 12
   323→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   324→                Case 13
   325→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   326→                Case 14
   327→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   328→                Case 15
   329→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   330→                Case Else
   331→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   332→            End Select
   333→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   334→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   335→            Else
   336→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   337→                Exit Do
   338→            End If
   339→        Loop
   340→
   341→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   342→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   343→        Else
   344→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   345→        End If
   346→    End Function
   347→

   359→           &H1680, &HD641, &HD201, &H12C0, &H1380, &HD341, _
   360→           &H1100, &HD1C1, &HD081, &H1040, &HF001, &H30C0, _

   366→           &H2800, &HE8C1, &HE981, &H2940, &HEB01, &H2BC0, _
   367→           &H2A80, &HEA41, &HEE01, &H2EC0, &H2F80, &HEF41, _
   368→           &H2D00, &HEDC1, &HEC81, &H2C40, &HE401, &H24C0, _
   369→           &H2580, &HE541, &H2700, &HE7C1, &HE681, &H2640, _
   370→           &H2200, &HE2C1, &HE381, &H2340, &HE101, &H21C0, _
   371→           &H2080, &HE041, &HA001, &H60C0, &H6180, &HA141, _
   372→           &H6300, &HA3C1, &HA281, &H6240, &H6600, &HA6C1, _
   373→           &HA781, &H6740, &HA501, &H65C0, &H6480, &HA441, _
   374→           &H6C00, &HACC1, &HAD81, &H6D40, &HAF01, &H6FC0, _
   375→           &H6E80, &HAE41, &HAA01, &H6AC0, &H6B80, &HAB41, _
   376→           &H6900, &HA9C1, &HA881, &H6840, &H7800, &HB8C1, _
   377→           &HB981, &H7940, &HBB01, &H7BC0, &H7A80, &HBA41, _
   378→           &HBE01, &H7EC0, &H7F80, &HBF41, &H7D00, &HBDC1, _
   379→           &HBC81, &H7C40, &HB401, &H74C0, &H7580, &HB541, _
   380→           &H7700, &HB7C1, &HB681, &H7640, &H7200, &HB2C1, _
   381→           &HB381, &H7340, &HB101, &H71C0, &H7080, &HB041, _
   382→           &H5000, &H90C1, &H9181, &H5140, &H9301, &H53C0, _
   383→           &H5280, &H9241, &H9601, &H56C0, &H5780, &H9741, _
   384→           &H5500, &H95C1, &H9481, &H5440, &H9C01, &H5CC0, _
   385→           &H5D80, &H9D41, &H5F00, &H9FC1, &H9E81, &H5E40, _
   386→           &H5A00, &H9AC1, &H9B81, &H5B40, &H9901, &H59C0, _
   387→           &H5880, &H9841, &H8801, &H48C0, &H4980, &H8941, _
   388→           &H4B00, &H8BC1, &H8A81, &H4A40, &H4E00, &H8EC1, _
   389→           &H8F81, &H4F40, &H8D01, &H4DC0, &H4C80, &H8C41, _
   390→           &H4400, &H84C1, &H8581, &H4540, &H8701, &H47C0, _
   391→           &H4680, &H8641, &H8201, &H42C0, &H4380, &H8341, _
   392→           &H4100, &H81C1, &H8081, &H4040}
   393→
   394→        Public Shared Function ComputeCrc(ByVal data As Byte()) As UInt16
   395→
   396→            Dim crc As UShort = &HFFFF
   397→
   398→            For Each datum As Byte In data
   399→                crc = CUShort((crc >> 8) Xor CrcTable((crc Xor datum) And &HFF))
   400→            Next
   401→
   402→            Return crc
   403→
   404→        End Function
   405→
   406→    End Class
   407→
   408→End Module
   409→

content.text:
완벽합니다. 요청한 정보를 찾았습니다.

## Load_BASIC_Data() 함수 (완전한 코드)

```vb
Public Sub Load_BASIC_Data()

    Connection_Open_MDB()
    Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

    Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

    Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_BASIC", Mdb_Connect)

    If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

        BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value)
        BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value)
        BASIC_SAB_TQ_UNIT = Rs.Fields("TOOL1_UNIT").Value

        ResistUse = Rs.Fields("RESISTUSE").Value
        LEFT_RESIST_MIN = CDbl(Rs.Fields("LEFT_RESIST_MIN").Value)
        LEFT_RESIST_MAX = CDbl(Rs.Fields("LEFT_RESIST_MAX").Value)
        RIGHT_RESIST_MIN = CDbl(Rs.Fields("RIGHT_RESIST_MIN").Value)
        RIGHT_RESIST_MAX = CDbl(Rs.Fields("RIGHT_RESIST_MAX").Value)
        LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET = CDbl(Rs.Fields("LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET").Value)
        RIGHT_RESIST_OFFSET = CDbl(Rs.Fields("RIGHT_RESIST_OFFSET").Value)

    End If

    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
    Rs.Close()
    Connection_Close_MDB()

    ' F/PROOF 중복체크 플래그 컬럼 자동 생성 및 로드
    CheckAndAddFlagColumn("FLAG_SAB_DUP")
    LoadFProofFlags()

End Sub
```

## Table_BASIC에서 읽는 모든 컬럼명

1. **TOOL1_MIN**
2. **TOOL1_MAX**
3. **TOOL1_UNIT**
4. **RESISTUSE**
5. **LEFT_RESIST_MIN**
6. **LEFT_RESIST_MAX**
7. **RIGHT_RESIST_MIN**
8. **RIGHT_RESIST_MAX**
9. **LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET**
10. **RIGHT_RESIST_OFFSET**
11. **FLAG_SAB_DUP** (LoadFProofFlags()에서 로드)

## CheckAndAddTextColumn / CheckAndAddFlagColumn 함수 상태

- **CheckAndAddTextColumn**: 파일에서 **존재하지 않음**
- **CheckAndAddFlagColumn**: **존재함** (라인 180-189)
  ```vb
  Public Sub CheckAndAddFlagColumn(ByVal columnName As String)
      Try
          Connection_Open_MDB()
          Dim strSQL As String = "ALTER TABLE Table_BASIC ADD COLUMN " & columnName & " YESNO"
          Mdb_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
          Connection_Close_MDB()
      Catch ex As Exception
          Try : Connection_Close_MDB() : Catch : End Try
      End Try
  End Sub
  ```

추가로 **LoadFProofFlags()** (191-208행)와 **SaveFProofFlags()** (210-228행) 함수도 구현되어 있습니다.
